title: 愛我的人和我愛的人
research_summary: 這首歌表達了一種深情的愛情故事，通過平實而真摯的語言傳遞著歌手對愛情的理解和感慨。
color_palette: Soft Pink, Light Blue, Cream White, Pale Yellow, Muted Green
background_prompt: A quiet park at dusk with a small pond reflecting the setting sun and distant trees, soft golden light from street lamps casting long shadows in an old-fashioned neighborhood.
outfit_prompt: Casual yet elegant attire: A simple white shirt with loose sleeves, slightly oversized for comfort, paired with dark wash jeans and comfortable shoes. The character carries a single red rose in one hand.
scene_description: MV中，男主角身著簡約而舒適的服裝在傍晚時分漫步於一個安靜的小公園內。周圍散發出柔和的黃金色光線，映襯著遠處樹木和小池塘中反光的夕陽景象。場景充滿詩意與浪漫氛圍，同時帶有一絲淡淡的哀愁，反映了歌曲中的情感深度。
